verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He pardoned my transgressions, He sanctified my soul, He honors my confessions, Since by His blood I'm whole.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It is truly wonderful What the Lord has done! It is truly wonderful! It is truly wonderful! It is truly wonderful What the Lord has done! Glory to His name.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He keeps me every moment By trusting in His grace; 'Tis thro His blest atonement, That I may see His face.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He brings me through affliction, He leaves me not alone; He's with me in temptation, He keeps me for His own.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He prospers and protects me, His blessings ever flow; He fills me with His glory, He makes me white as snow.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: He keeps me firm and faithful, His love I do enjoy, For this I shall be grateful, And live in His employ.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: There's not a single blessing Which we receive on earth That does not come from heaven, The source of our new birth.
